description: This source file contains unit tests for the Tooltip component, testing its behavior, DOM interactions, and configuration options within a JavaScript project. It imports Tooltip implementation, event handling, and fixture helpers, and defines numerous test cases covering creation, display, hiding, updating, and disposal of tooltip instances.

classes.name: Tooltip
classes.description: The Tooltip class controls the creation, display, updating, and disposal of tooltip UI components attached to DOM elements.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Returns the Tooltip instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns the existing Tooltip instance if present; otherwise, creates a new instance with optional configuration.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: JQuery plugin interface for Tooltip, enabling creation and method calls via jQuery API.
